title: Advertising Sales Agents
description: Sell or solicit advertising space, time, or media in publications, signage, TV, radio, or Internet establishments or public spaces.

tasks.text: Prepare and deliver sales presentations to new and existing customers to sell new advertising programs and to protect and increase existing advertising.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain assigned account bases while developing new accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide clients with estimates of the costs of advertising products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and contact potential clients to offer advertising services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain to customers how specific types of advertising will help promote their products or services in the most effective way possible.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and study information about clients' products, needs, problems, advertising history, and business practices to offer effective sales presentations and appropriate product assistance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare promotional plans, sales literature, media kits, and sales contracts, using computer.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Process all correspondence and paperwork related to accounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw up contracts for advertising work, and collect payments due.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver advertising or illustration proofs to customers for approval.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform customers of available options for advertisement artwork, and provide samples.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend appropriate sizes and formats for advertising, depending on medium used.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write copy as part of layout.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine advertising medium to be used, and prepare sample advertisements within the selected medium for presentation to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather all relevant material for bid processes, and coordinate bidding and contract approval.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with company officials, sales departments, and advertising agencies to develop promotional plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify new advertising markets, and propose products to serve them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for commercial taping sessions, and accompany clients to sessions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend sales meetings, industry trade shows, and training seminars to gather information, promote products, expand network of contacts, and increase knowledge.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write sales outlines for use by staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
